title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition released FrontierCode, a benchmark that measures whether AI-generated code is mergeable by real maintainers, using blocker criteria and weighted scores rather than just test passage. It covers tasks from 36 open-source repositories and compares models like Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5 on code quality standards beyond unit tests.
